acceptance.label: The new runtime meets the agreed interactivity, diagnostics-latency, and memory budgets, surfaces unsettled domains explicitly, and keeps runtime status and dashboard surfaces on bounded materialized read models instead of request-time reconstruction.

payload.summary: Validate the full performance-beast end state against hard budgets: tiny-edit fast-path latency, many-file burst throughput, queue wait time, settle lag, restart recovery time, and bounded memory. Validate generation drift behavior on handles, tool outputs, and published read surfaces; validate that unsettled domains are surfaced rather than silently hidden; and validate the machine-scoped host model with multiple worktree-scoped engines sharing one local runtime store for the same repo. Retire or clearly demote old reconstructive snapshot surfaces so the old architecture cannot drift back in unnoticed.
payload.title: Validate the performance-beast end state and remove backsliding surfaces
